description: Style Note The perfect blend of beauty and style, this handmade necklace from adrika adds a touch of glamour to your wardrobe. Pair it with any outfit for a chic and bold look. Product DetailsBlue necklace with glass beads, metal leaf  and metal chain detail that has a lobster clasp Material and CareGlass beads and metal chain Wipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirt Size Length of necklace: 31 cm
